request.taskTitle: Externalize declarative memory promotion and recall policy
request.query: What should happen next with the governed automation task "Externalize declarative memory promotion and recall policy" in phase "Memory Governance Core Hardening"?

groundedContext.query: What should happen next with the governed automation task "Externalize declarative memory promotion and recall policy" in phase "Memory Governance Core Hardening"?
semanticNodeLabels: Externalize declarative memory promotion and recall policy
Teach heartbeat to select the next governed slice after phase closure
Formalize the epistemic, policy, and audit primitives that make Victor's memory system inspectable, phase-gated, and safe to promote beyond structural GraphRAG capability.
Prepare unattended 30m heartbeat operation with safe stop conditions
Separate non-project reflection from Builder artifacts
Add deterministic policy interception across memory lifecycle phases
Automation activity and build progress remain queryable as separate surfaces.

before.title: Externalize declarative memory promotion and recall policy
before.description: Create a dedicated memory policy artifact that defines promotion thresholds, recall modes, contradiction rules, and stale-cache handling instead of leaving those semantics embedded in code paths.
acceptance: Memory promotion and recall thresholds live in a declarative policy file.
Contradiction and stale-cache rules are inspectable without reading implementation code.
Policy versioning is wired into memory governance decisions.
